icpc_bin_jin_2010: Bin Jin was a member of the 2010 ICPC (International Collegiate Programming Contest) World Finals gold-medal winning team from Shanghai Jiao Tong University. ICPC World Finals gold-medal teams represent the world's top university-level competitive programmers. Many alumni go on to careers in software engineering at top technology companies, quantitative finance, or academic computer science.
